name: TestIso11783IL_OPShowObject
title: TestIso11783IL_OPShowObject
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPShowObject( dbNode node, dword objectID, dword show );

The function shows or hides an object. The Show Object command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
objectID object ID of the object to show or hide
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred, see error codes
